name: StarryNight
short_description: 《星夜迷城》是一款轻松休闲的的策略，建设，塔防类型的小游戏。玩家需要在有限的时间内生存发展，并且抵御敌人的进攻，合理的利用资源，将会是成功的关键。
detailed_description:
《Starry Night 》is a casual strategy, construction, and tower defense mini game. Players need to survive and develop within a limited time, resist enemy attacks, and make reasonable use of resources, which will be the key to success.
Players need to build and develop within 15 rounds, and defend their own land. Each turn will see a continuous stream of enemies appearing and becoming increasingly powerful, and players will also receive various benefits under the blessing of starlight. After reasonable combination and selection of talent upgrades, they will also obtain even more powerful special effects.
At present, there is only one game mode in the game, and we are considering developing new game content and new game modes at our discretion.
